name: Unlayer
long_description: Unlayer helps companies add AI-powered content creation into their products without building it from scratch. Developers can embed visual builders for emails, pages, popups, and documents, then connect them to AI agents, templates, asset storage, exports, and APIs. We give teams the building blocks to let users and AI workflows create, edit, personalize, translate, and ship content directly inside their own product.
one_liner: AI-powered content creation infrastructure for apps
